dialogue_texts: Things seem to look a little "unroyal" here in Kozankyo.
How did all of this "mail" get on the ground?
Argh... No... Confound it! Where have they all gone?
Oh! Sorry, My Majesty. Very sorry. I didn't notice you were standing in my way!
I accept your apology. You almost made me fall off my broom!
Anyway, do you have an idea how all this mail was scattered in the city?
I was trying to gather all of the mail I need to deliver and I wasn't watching where I was going.
Do you know how this happened?
As a junior high schooler, I tend to get clumsy and lose the mail that I need to deliver.
I also didn't take the chance to introduce myself.
The name's Kotori Tegami - a tengu who delivers the mail to Kozankyo's residents.
You're a little too young to be doing that. You'll get better as you get older.
I'm normally a perfect postgirl, but I'm having trouble trying to get all the mail back in my pouch.
I don't have time to help because of a rumor from the Gensokyo Socialite Order I'm pursuing.
Rumor? Wouldn't you know it - I don't want to get persecuted by the Order...
As the queen, my mission is to protect Kozankyo and prevent the Order from resurfacing.
I would have to halt my job in that case...
I'll be searching thoroughly for a while...
Well, I have to go, so I'll leave it to you.
I can't, I have a crucial deadline approaching.
Time is money... you'll see me fired without it!
